_comment: Canonical Case Title Generator agent model. Lightweight agent that generates concise, meaningful case titles from descriptions or messages.
name: CaseTitleGeneratorAgent
description: Utility for generating short, meaningful titles for cases.

description.description: The case description or initial message.

max_length.description: The maximum character length for the generated title.

fallback.description: True if the title is a fallback (not generated by LLM).
